name: feature-store
description: Feature engineering and feature store with Feast, Tecton, Hopsworks, or custom. Covers feature definitions, materialization, online/offline stores, feature discovery, and ML feature pipelines.
author: anwar

commands.name: fs:feast
commands.prompt:
Create Feast feature store with:
- Registry: file, SQL, GCS, S3
- Online store: Redis, DynamoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Snowflake
- Offline store: BigQuery, Redshift, Snowflake, PostgreSQL, Parquet
- Entities: keys, descriptions, join keys
- Feature views: entities, features, TTL, online/offline
- Feature services: grouping, serving, transformation
- Materialization: incremental, full, TTL-based
- Transformations: pandas, PySpark, SQL, on-demand
- Streaming: Kafka, Kinesis, push sources
- UI: feature discovery, lineage, monitoring
- CI/CD: plan, apply, test, deploy
- Permissions: RBAC, project isolation

commands.name: fs:tecton
commands.prompt:
Create Tecton feature platform with:
- Feature views: batch, stream, real-time, request-time
- Aggregations: time-windowed, sliding, session
- Transformations: Python, SQL, PySpark
- Materialization: online (Redis, DynamoDB), offline (Snowflake, Databricks)
- Monitoring: freshness, quality, drift, usage
- Governance: ownership, tags, descriptions, lineage
- Workspaces: dev, staging, prod
- GitOps: CI/CD, preview, promotion
- API: Python, REST, SQL
- Integrations: dbt, Airflow, Dagster, Spark, Flink

commands.name: fs:custom
commands.prompt:
Build custom feature store with:
- Offline: DuckDB, ClickHouse, Trino, Athena, Parquet on S3
- Online: Redis Cluster, Dragonfly, KeyDB, Cassandra, ScyllaDB
- Feature definitions: YAML, Python DSL, SQL
- Computation: Polars, DuckDB, DataFusion, Arrow
- Materialization: incremental, batch, streaming (Bytewax, RisingWave)
- Serving: gRPC, REST, GraphQL, feature vectors
- Versioning: Git, DVC, LakeFS, Iceberg time travel
- Quality: Great Expectations, custom validators
- Discovery: search, tags, lineage, usage stats
- Access control: ABAC, row-level, column-level

commands.name: fs:pipeline
commands.prompt:
Create feature engineering pipeline with:
- Raw data: event logs, transactions, user behavior, sensors
- Transformations: aggregations, embeddings, encodings, interactions
- Time-aware: point-in-time correctness, no leakage
- Scalability: incremental, distributed, GPU-accelerated
- Quality: null checks, distribution, cardinality, drift
- Documentation: feature catalog, descriptions, owners
- Testing: unit, integration, golden files, regression
- Deployment: CI/CD, feature flags, rollback
- Monitoring: freshness, latency, throughput, errors
- Cost: compute optimization, storage tiering, TTL

agents.name: feature-engineer
agents.description: Feature engineer for ML feature platforms
agents.prompt: You are a feature engineer. Build scalable feature systems with: Feast, Tecton, or custom (DuckDB, Redis, Polars). Focus on: point-in-time correctness, incremental computation, online/offline consistency, feature discovery, governance, cost optimization. Write production pipelines with quality checks, monitoring, and documentation.
